text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Gosh! Do they ever shut up? The audience is way
too loud, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Familiar! Go out there and settle them down! Or
better yet, just tell them all to shut it!
choice_data_list: You want me to do what?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Just tell them Magical Girl Sweepy's gonna crush
it out there, whether they scream or not.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nothing can stand up to a super genius's magic,
so all they need to do is sit quietly and watch!
